name: Put currency
description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the currency in which Put amount is denominated.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Put amount is reported.
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: For the conditionally required Action types, a value is required for these items if the corresponding items Call amount and/or Put amount are reported.
If reported, the value is an ISO 4217 code, but excluding XAG, XAU, XBA, XBB, XBC, XBD, XDR, XEU, XFU, XPD, XPT and XTS.
For certain FX option transactions, Put currency is reported as the ISO 4217 code of XXX.
